title: registry entry format finalized
manager: The registry entry format — what a published machine's registry record contains, where the publish bundle itself IS the entry — finalized now, even though registry hosting waits for v16. Nailing the entry format early means the irreversible part (how a machine is described and identified in a registry) is settled before anyone builds on it, so the ecosystem era can host without having to redesign the record and break everything already published.
cs: registry ENTRY format final (publish bundle = entry); hosting stays v16; the irreversible record shape settled before the marketplace exists.
